title: Lean Scorecard
subtitle: Your factory's lean maturity at a glance
demoNote: Showing demo data — complete the Lean Assessment for real scores
trendNote: Monthly lean maturity score based on assessment and module activity
quickWinsDesc: Focus on these areas for the biggest improvement impact
suggestWorkplace: Start with a 6S audit to establish baseline workplace organization standards
suggestVisual: Install hourly production tracking boards and set up the OEE Dashboard
suggestStandard: Document your top 5 critical SOPs and make them accessible at workstations
suggestImprovement: Launch a Kaizen board and schedule your first improvement event
suggestProblem: Use 5-Why analysis on your next quality issue to build root cause skills
suggestTPM: Register critical equipment in TPM Dashboard and create CILT checklists
suggestDefault: Review this area and identify one actionable improvement
